tokens: Apollo 12 Flight Journal - Index PageThe Apollo 12 Flight JournalDavid Woods and Lennox J.

WaughWelcome to this 15 February 2025 release of theApollo 12 Flight Journal, part of theApollo Flight Journalseries.Like its companion, theApollo Lunar Surface Journal, it is intended to be a resource for all those interested in the Apollo program, whether in a passing or scholarly capacity.
This journal covers the flight of Apollo 12 from launch to splashdown.

As aliving document, it will continue to grow and evolve.Journals for other Apollo flights are available at theAFJ Portal.Travelling from the Earth to the MoonDay 1, part 1: Launch and Reaching Earth OrbitDay 1, part 2: Earth Orbit and Translunar InjectionDay 1, part 3: Transposition, Docking and ExtractionDay 1, part 4: LM InspectionDay 1, part 5: PTC and back over to the LMDay 2, part 1: Midcourse Correction 2 BurnDay 2, part 2: Quiet end to the dayDay 3, part 1: Day of the Tuna FishDay 3, part 2: TV ShowDay 4, part 1: Approaching the M...
